name: Process Creation and Termination
description: Tracks process creation and termination. Event 4688 (requires audit policy + command line logging enabled) and Sysmon Event 1 provide full command lines, parent process, and user context. Essential for detecting malware execution, LOLBins, and lateral movement tools.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4688: Process created — requires 'Audit Process Creation' + 'Include command line in process creation events' policy. Fields: NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType, SubjectUserName
event_descriptions.4689: Process exited — includes exit code, duration derivable from 4688/4689 pair
event_descriptions.1: Sysmon: Process created — full CommandLine, Image, ParentImage, User, Hashes, ProcessGuid, ParentProcessGuid, CurrentDirectory
event_descriptions.5: Sysmon: Process terminated — ProcessGuid for correlation with Event 1
